# Grafana Dashboard Assets

This directory contains static Grafana dashboard JSON files for SeaTunnelX remote observability mode.

## Files

- `dashboards/seatunnel-overview-en.json`
- `dashboards/seatunnel-overview-zh.json`

## Notes

- Dashboard datasource UID is expected to be `prometheus`.
- The two dashboards are language variants with fixed UIDs:
  - `seatunnel-overview-en`
  - `seatunnel-overview-zh`
